items.title: New Orleans Pelicans Forward Saddiq Bey Has Earned Contract Extension
items.author: Yahoo Sports Canada
items.body_excerpt: New Orleans Pelicans Forward Saddiq Bey Has Earned Contract Extension Yahoo Sports Canada

items.title: Gonna be out of town but Saddiq Bey is extension eligible starting tomorrow for a maximum of ~4/$93M. These are some extension done in the past for somewhat similar players. But the Tobias and Rui free agency deals do change the calculus.
items.author: Shamit Dua
items.body_excerpt: Gonna be out of town but Saddiq Bey is extension eligible starting tomorrow for a maximum of ~4/$93M. These are some extension done in the past for somewhat similar players. But the Tobias and Rui free agency deals do change the calculus.
